title: The Adventuress
writer: Álvaro Custodio, Carlos Sampelayo, Alberto Gout
actors: Ninón Sevilla, Tito Junco, Andrea Palma
plot: Left alone after her mother runs off with another man and her father kills himself, Elena attempts to make a new life for herself in a new city. Believing he's a friend, Elena goes to dinner with "Pretty Boy" Lucio, but he drugs h...
